name: repo-visualiser-monorepo
description: Interactive dependency/behavior map for a code repository — workspaces root.

scripts.build: npm run build -w repo-visualiser && npm run compile -w repo-visualiser-vscode
scripts.check-types: npm run build:core && npm run check-types -w repo-visualiser && npm run check-types -w repo-visualiser-vscode
scripts.test: npm run test -w repo-visualiser && npm run test -w repo-visualiser-vscode
